title: Fix: hex task list agent column and swarm grouping
description: Fix two bugs in hex task list: (1) tasks not grouped by swarm because _swarm_id is collected but unused in task.rs, (2) agentId not surfaced correctly from /api/swarms/active response

phases.name: Fix CLI grouping and agent column rendering
phases.description: Sort all_tasks by swarm_name before rendering so tasks group by swarm. Verify agentId field mapping is correct.

tasks.name: Sort tasks by swarm_name in task.rs list()
tasks.description: In the list() function, after collecting all_tasks, add: all_tasks.sort_by(|a, b| a.0.cmp(&b.0)); This makes tasks from the same swarm contiguous. The _swarm_id at line 154 can then be used (remove the underscore prefix) to detect swarm boundaries if we want separator rows, but sorting alone satisfies S02.
tasks.done_condition: cargo check passes; tasks sorted by swarm name in output

tasks.name: Verify agentId field mapping in task.rs
tasks.description: SwarmTaskInfo serializes as camelCase (serde rename_all), so agentId is correct. The CLI already reads task["agentId"] first. The issue is the nexus may serialize agent_id as empty string for unassigned tasks. Confirm the field reads correctly for assigned tasks by tracing from swarms.rs line 133 (serde_json::to_value(&tasks)) through SwarmTaskInfo. If agentId is always empty in /api/swarms/active even when assigned, add a note in the code comment and handle in P1.
tasks.done_condition: Code reviewed; agentId reads correctly or root cause documented

phases.name: Fix nexus agentId population in /api/swarms/active
phases.description: Ensure the /api/swarms/active route returns the real agentId for assigned tasks, not empty string.

tasks.name: Trace agentId population from coordination layer through swarms.rs
tasks.description: In swarms.rs line 133, tasks are embedded via serde_json::to_value(&tasks). Check that HexFlo::task_list() populates agent_id on SwarmTaskInfo for assigned tasks. The coordination/mod.rs task_create_full (line 258) sets agent_id when provided. Check swarm_task_assign (line 275-287) updates the stored task's agent_id. If the in-memory or SQLite store doesn't update agent_id on assign, fix it here.
tasks.done_condition: curl GET /api/swarms/active returns non-empty agentId for an assigned task

phases.name: Integration verification
phases.description: End-to-end smoke test: assign a task, run hex task list, verify agent column populated and tasks grouped.

tasks.name: Smoke test: hex task list shows agent and groups by swarm
tasks.description: 1. Ensure hex-nexus is running (hex nexus status). 2. Create a test swarm and task (hex swarm init test-fix; hex task create <swarm-id> 'test task'). 3. Assign the task (hex task assign <task-id>). 4. Run hex task list and verify: Agent column is non-empty for the assigned task, tasks are sorted by swarm name. 5. Run with two swarms to verify grouping.
tasks.done_condition: hex task list output shows grouped tasks and populated agent column for assigned tasks

successCriteria: hex task list output groups all tasks from swarm A before tasks from swarm B
hex task list shows populated Agent column for tasks assigned via hex task assign
hex task list shows empty Agent column (not 'null' or '-') for unassigned tasks
cargo check passes on both hex-cli and hex-nexus with no new warnings
